news.headline: Santa's magic sleigh uses telematics for efficient travel; 100 million-mile global trip with millions of stops.
news.summary: Santa Claus is preparing for his yearly global journey, which spans 100 million miles and includes millions of stops in one night. To ensure efficient delivery of joy without delays, Santa utilizes data from Geotab. This valuable tool assists him in navigating the various locations he needs to reach in a timely manner. As Christmas approaches, Santa is relying on this technological aid to bring holiday cheer to homes worldwide.

news.headline: Influencer Haliey Welch addresses meme coin scandal after HAWK crash; vows to assist affected investors. Blockchain analyst ZachXBT had warned about the coin. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Social media influencer Hailey Welch, also known as the "Hawk Tuah Girl," recently addressed the public after a lawsuit was filed by investors following the crash of the Hawk meme coin. Welch, 22, posted a statement on X, pledging to reveal the truth, assist impacted individuals, and hold those responsible accountable. She urged affected investors to contact Burwick Law, the firm representing plaintiffs. Blockchain investigator ZachXBT emphasized prior warnings about the HAWK coin in a tweet dated Nov. 6. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Reltio recognized as Best-of-Breed Vendor in 2024 Gartner Market Guide for MDM Solutions. Includes Customer 360™ & MDM.
news.summary: A company based in Redwood Shores, California, Reltio®, known for its expertise in data unification and management, was acknowledged in the latest Gartner Market Guide for Master Data Management Solutions report. This report by Gartner focuses on the changing MDM market and serves as a reference for businesses in search of an MDM solution. Reltio Data Cloud™ integrates all offerings within Reltio, such as Reltio Customer 360™, Multidomain Master Data Management (MDM), and Entity Resolution.

news.headline: Global IoT in healthcare market projected to reach $121.45 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 13.3% from 2024-2031.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report "IoT in Healthcare Market Size, Share, Forecast, & Trends Analysis by Offering Application End User" is now available, showing a promising outlook. The global IoT in healthcare market is anticipated to soar to $121.45 billion by 2031, with a solid growth rate of 13.3% expected between 2024 and 2031. This expansion is primarily attributed to the rising integration of digital solutions within the healthcare industry, driving significant advancements in this sector.

news.headline: FDA grants tea the "healthy" label. Consume 2 cups daily for heart & metabolic health. - Tea Council News - 12/19/24.
news.summary: Boost your heart and metabolic health by incorporating two cups of tea into your daily routine, according to recent news. The FDA's new rule on labeling foods as "healthy" now allows tea to make this claim, providing a significant opportunity for the beverage. This update was announced on December 19, 2024, marking a positive shift in how tea is viewed in terms of its health benefits. Embracing this recommendation could potentially lead to improved overall well-being, making it a simple yet impactful addition to your daily diet.

news.headline: Wealthy Drahi relocates from Switzerland to Israel in a surprising move.
Leishen Energy Holding Co., Ltd. closed $5.5 million IPO, offering 1,375,000 ordinary shares at $4 each on Nasdaq.
news.summary: In Beijing, China on December 20, 2024, Leishen Energy Holding Co., Ltd. publicly disclosed the successful completion of its initial public offering (IPO). A total of 1,375,000 ordinary shares were issued during the offering, with each share priced at $4.00. The company, known for its provision of clean-energy equipment and integrated solutions for the oil and gas sector, is listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol "LSE". Trading of the offered shares commenced on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Helen Chandler-Wilde: Reports on 20% Jump in Twinkling Lights amidst Pandemic Shutdowns.
Ningbo's city character and global connections are being discussed online by cultural figures, sparking conversations since December 14.
news.summary: In Ningbo, China, starting from December 14, 2024, influential cultural personalities like Xu Zhiyuan and Liu Qing have initiated discussions online about the city's unique traits and international relationships. Xu Zhiyuan, a celebrated writer and cultural presenter, has been at the forefront of sparking this digital dialogue.

news.headline: Mastercard acquires Recorded Future; deal finalized.
news.summary: Mastercard (NYSE: MA) announced today the successful acquisition of Recorded Future.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates LTRPA, LTRPB, CYTH, SKGR for potential violations, protecting shareholders.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, has commenced investigations into several companies regarding potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is Liberty TripAdvisor Holdings, Inc. The investigation aims to assess any violations that may have occurred and evaluate the impact on shareholders.

news.headline: Volta Finance Limited's Net Asset Value as of 30 Nov 2024 released in November 2024 report (VTA / VTAS).
news.summary: The monthly report for November 2024 of Volta Finance Limited (VTA / VTAS) has been released. This information is not intended for release, distribution, or publication, in whole or in part, in or into the United States.

news.headline: Estonian FSA issues precept to Northern Horizon Capital AS based on May 2024 inspection findings, requiring improvements.
news.summary: In May 2024, Estonian financial regulatory authorities conducted a thorough on-site inspection of Northern Horizon Capital AS, evaluating its internal control system and measures to address conflicts of interest. Subsequently, on 19 December 2024, the Estonian FSA issued a precept to Northern Horizon Capital AS, mandating enhancements to certain aspects of its internal control procedures and rectification of identified deficiencies.

news.headline: Carolina Sanchez appointed as Vice President of People at Synteq Digital, a global digital computing solutions provider.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on December 20, 2024, Synteq Digital (Synteq), a worldwide supplier of digital computing solutions, has named Carolina Sanchez as the Vice President and Head of People. Sanchez brings to the role more than 15 years of proven knowledge in human capital management.

news.headline: Competition intensifies in airline rewards program as challenges rise.
November's PCE inflation grew by 2.4%, below forecasts of 2.5%, indicating that the "sticky inflation" may be shifting.
news.summary: On Friday, the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index showed a milder-than-anticipated trend. In November, PCE inflation rose to 2.4%, up slightly from 2.3% in October, falling short of the 2.5% predicted by economists. Analysts are now discussing the implications of this data for the Federal Reserve and the markets in 2025. Chris Larkin, the managing director of trading and investing at E-Trade Morgan Stanley, noted that "Sticky inflation appeared to be a little less stuck this morning." The Fed's favored inflation measure came in below expectations. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Saras AI Institute offers full-ride scholarship contest to Utah students with interest in AI.
news.summary: An opportunity for Utah students interested in artificial intelligence (AI) has been unveiled by Saras AI Institute in Salt Lake City. This scholarship contest has been initiated for aspiring individuals eager to delve into the field of AI.

news.headline: National Partnership for Child Safety shares data insights among child welfare agencies, aims to prevent child maltreatment fatalities; growing in 2024.
news.summary: In its latest update on December 20, 2024, the National Partnership for Child Safety (NPCS) discussed its efforts to enhance child safety and prevent child maltreatment fatalities. This quality improvement collaborative shared significant details regarding its partnership activities aimed at bolstering child safety and addressing various challenges in this area. The organization highlighted its mission to improve child safety and prevent child maltreatment fatalities, underlining the importance of these measures for safeguarding children. The NPCS outlined key initiatives and accomplishments throughout the year, emphasizing the critical role of collaborative efforts in ensuring a safer environment for children.

news.headline: American Water Charitable Foundation and Illinois American Water have donated $20,000 to Chicago Urban League for workforce development.
news.summary: In Woodridge, Illinois, the American Water Charitable Foundation, a 501(c)(3) organization founded by American Water, the leading water and wastewater utility in the U.S., along with Illinois American Water, revealed that the Chicago Urban League (CUL) has been granted $20,000 as a portion of a substantial Foundation Corporate Strategic grant. This funding is intended to boost workforce development programs focused on reducing disparities for African Americans and other minority groups.

news.headline: JP Morgan analyst predicts $70 Brent forecast in 2025, with updates on key oil sectors. Highlights Exxon Mobil, Chevron, Cenovus, and Imperial Oil.
news.summary: In anticipation of 2025, JP Morgan analyst John M Royall provided insights on the North American Integrated Oils sector. Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) saw no change in its Overweight rating and a price target of $125 due to its defensive traits and valuable projects. JP Morgan maintained a ‘Not Rated’ status for Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) linked to its HES acquisition. Cenovus Energy Inc (NYSE:CVE) held onto its Overweight rating for its unique execution strategy and attractive valuation. Imperial Oil Limited (AMEX:IMO) was downgraded by Royall to Underweight from Neutral due to its poor free cash flow yields. For more details, visit Benzinga without source mention.

news.headline: Deep Six Kava Bar in King of Prussia introduces kava, THC, and CBD drinks as alcohol alternatives, catering to wellness needs in Philly.
news.summary: In King of Prussia, Pennsylvania, on December 20, 2024, Deep Six Kava Bar revealed its expanding footprint in the Philadelphia region, serving as a center for well-being, calmness, and unique social interactions. With a focus on providing a healthier and more eco-friendly atmosphere for relaxation and socializing, the bar is witnessing a rise in popularity among individuals looking for alternative methods to unwind.

news.headline: Lee Kum Kee partners with Uncle Sharkii Poke Bar to offer a teriyaki chicken poke bowl in Hawaii - announced on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: A renowned fast-food spot in Hawaii has added a beloved sauce to its menu. Lee Kum Kee, a leading producer of Asian sauces, has partnered with Uncle Sharkii Poke Bar. The collaboration, announced on Dec. 20, 2024, brings a new level of flavor to the menu. Uncle Sharkii customers can now enjoy dishes infused with the delectable sauce from the globally recognized brand. This partnership is receiving positive feedback among food enthusiasts.

news.headline: INVNT® sees unprecedented global growth in 2024, expanding to South Asia, APAC, EMEA, serving renowned brands including General Motors, Samsung, Netflix, Amazon. Their offerings span Experiences, Innovation, Digital, and Education, with investments in Event Management. Noteworthy achievements include launching a digital art campaign on the International Space Station and advancements in AI.
news.summary: INVNT, a leader in brand storytelling, experienced significant growth in 2024, serving top brands like General Motors, Oracle, and Amazon. The company expanded in international markets and enhanced its offerings in Experiences, Innovation, Digital, and Higher Education. They also invested in Event Management to provide unique experiences for physical and virtual audiences. Major achievements included launching a digital art campaign on the International Space Station and AI-driven advancements for clients. President and CEO, Scott Cullather, emphasized the company's commitment to creativity and audience engagement.

news.headline: Trump wants a 5% NATO defence spending target - FT.
Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute showcases Rx To Go's growth in patient-centered cancer care.
news.summary: In Fort Myers, Florida, on December 20, 2024, Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC (FCS), a prominent figure in community oncology, celebrates the successes of its medically integrated pharmacy, Rx To Go. This pharmacy has provided tailored services and has shown substantial growth in delivering personalized care to a significant number of individuals.

news.headline: Fox Theatre, City of Refuge in Atlanta reduce carbon emissions through GA Natural Gas Greener Life for Business program.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Atlanta, two renowned establishments have recently committed to enhancing their sustainability efforts by enrolling in the Greener Life® for Business initiative offered by Georgia Natural Gas® (GNG). This program aims to promote eco-friendly practices among businesses. The total number of businesses participating in this program has now increased thanks to these additions.

news.headline: Octane completes $126M asset-backed securitization, backed by RV and marine collateral, receives AAA-rating.
news.summary: Octane Lending, Inc. has successfully closed its first asset-backed securities deal totaling $125.76 million, receiving a prestigious AAA-rating. This marks a significant achievement for the fintech company, known for transforming the purchasing process for large recreational investments. The deal is entirely supported by collateral from RVs and marine assets, solidifying its strong rating.

news.headline: Global sharing economy market to grow at 25.1% CAGR, estimated to reach $1.4 trillion by 2030 from $287.9 billion in 2023.
news.summary: In Dublin, the global market for the Sharing Economy was valued at approximately US$287.9 billion in 2023, with projections indicating it will surge to US$1.4 trillion by 2030, representing a notable CAGR of 25.1% during the forecast period. This detailed report, recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, furnishes a thorough examination of market dynamics, trends, and future estimations to aid businesses in strategic decision-making. The surge in the sharing economy showcases its increasing prominence and potential lucrative opportunities.

news.headline: DUPR launched the first-ever High School Pickleball League to provide high school athletes with a pathway to compete nationally.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on December 20, 2024, DUPR (Dynamic Universal Pickleball Rating) revealed the introduction of the inaugural High School Pickleball League. This league aims to offer high school athletes nationwide an opportunity to compete at state and national levels.

news.headline: Company reduces share capital by canceling treasury shares.
Global Live Cell Imaging Market provides real-time observation of living cells, aiding research and treatments; contributes to the growth of new tissues. Boston, Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: The Live Cell Imaging Market on a global scale enables scientists to monitor living cells without causing any harm, providing real-time insights. This technology aids in comprehending the functioning, growth, and responses of cells, facilitating the development of innovative disease treatments, enhanced body awareness, and the cultivation of new tissues. This advancement was reported in Boston on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Neeta Bhasin appointed to NY AAPI Commission, becoming the first Indian American woman. Inaugurated on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Neeta Bhasin, the President of ASB Communications, was officially appointed to the New York Asian American and Pacific Islander Commission. This significant event marks an important milestone for the Asian American and Pacific Islander community in New York. Bhasin's appointment brings a fresh perspective to the commission, representing a diverse voice in shaping policies and initiatives for this community. The inauguration highlighted the commitment to inclusivity and diversity in New York State governance. The presence of Bhasin on the commission signifies a step towards better representation and advocacy for Asian American and Pacific Islander populations. This development showcases the growing recognition of the community's contributions and challenges. It sets a positive precedent for increased engagement and support for Asian American and Pacific Islander individuals in New York.

news.headline: Sila Services acquires John Nugent & Sons, leading HVAC company in Northern VA since 1975, expanding its presence.
news.summary: Sila Services, LLC just revealed their acquisition of John Nugent & Sons, a prominent family-owned HVAC, plumbing, and electrical firm based in Sterling, VA. Established in 1975, the company has been providing services in Northern Virginia. This new partnership marks a significant development for Sila as they expand their reach in the industry.

news.headline: FirstEnergy appoints three new Vice Presidents to oversee finance, regulatory, construction, and design services. Kelly Gower assigned as VP of Finance and Regulatory for Pennsylvania. NYSE: FE.
news.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. has appointed Kelly Gower as the Vice President of Finance and Regulatory for Pennsylvania. The company also named leaders for similar roles in New Jersey. In addition, Construction and Design Services in Akron, Ohio, will be overseen by the new team. This announcement was made on December 20, 2024, with FirstEnergy Corp.'s stock listed on the New York Stock Exchange as FE.

news.headline: Canada's PM Trudeau shuffles the cabinet, leaves finance, innovation and foreign ministers in place - official document.
Kaldvik AS eyes acquiring vital assets in fish farming along Iceland's east coast.
France set to connect its first new nuclear unit to the grid in 22 years.
Tareen Development acquires Town Centre Plaza in Eagan, will rebrand as Eagan Medical Center at 1185 Town Centre Drive.
news.summary: In Eagan, Minnesota, on December 20, 2024, Tareen Development Partners disclosed the purchase of Town Centre Plaza, a medical office building at 1185 Town Centre Drive, Eagan, MN 55123. The property will be renamed Eagan Medical Center as part of a strategic rebranding move.

news.headline: Verde AgriTech Ltd. announced EGM results in Singapore, approval of all resolutions, and Record Date set for Oby Rare Earths distribution to shareholders.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Verde AgriTech Ltd. (TSX: “NPK”) successfully held its Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders in Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil. All resolutions proposed during the meeting were unanimously approved. Furthermore, the Company has established the Record Date for the issuance of interests in Oby Rare Earths Pty Ltd (“Oby”) to its shareholders. This development signifies a crucial step forward in Verde’s strategic expansion plans.

news.headline: Pepe Crypto (PEPE) down by 12%, a whale deposited 150 billion PEPE ($2.72M) on Binance, facing a $219,000 loss.
news.summary: The recent price decline of Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) has sparked concerns, despite its expanding user base and promising long-term prospects indicating potential future growth. According to Lookonchain data, a significant player moved 150 billion PEPE tokens, valued at $2.72 million, to Binance in an attempt to offset losses following the price dip. This move comes after the same entity withdrew 150 billion PEPE, worth $2.94 million, and 60 billion SHIB, valued at $1.52 million, from Binance on November 28. Presently, the whale is experiencing a loss of $219,000 on their PEPE holdings and a $136,000 loss on their SHIB investment. This information suggests a fluctuating market environment for cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Ipsos gains competition approval to acquire infas, forming a significant presence in market research in Germany.
news.summary: Ipsos has been granted competition clearance to acquire infas, solidifying their position as a key player in the market, opinion, and social research sector in Germany. This acquisition will combine the strengths of both companies, creating a significant presence with a wide range of research capabilities. The move is set to bolster Ipsos' offerings in the German market, enhancing their ability to provide comprehensive research solutions to clients.

news.headline: Brazil’s Central Bank spends $17B on reserves to boost Real currency value.
news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. This decline represents an addition of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. The data also shows that the GDP growth for the last quarter was 6.8%, exceeding initial projections. Additionally, the inflation rate remains stable at 2.3%. These positive economic indicators are seen as a result of government initiatives to boost employment and stimulate growth.

news.headline: US House Republicans weigh proposal for four separate bills, including three-month stopgap funding measure — CNN reporter on X, citing sources.
Fed core PCE price index rose tepidly in November; S&P 500 rallied post-key Fed inflation.
news.summary: In November, the Federal Reserve's core PCE price index, a key measure of inflation, experienced a modest increase following elevated readings in previous months. This data indicates a cooling in the primary inflation rate. Additionally, the S&P 500 showed a positive trend, rallying during this period. The Federal Reserve's core PCE index is an important gauge of inflation, and these recent figures suggest a stabilization after periods of higher inflation levels. This data was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Ferrari N.V. has bought back Euro 150 million worth of shares as part of a larger Euro 2 billion program through 2026.
news.summary: Italian luxury car manufacturer Ferrari N.V. has disclosed on December 20, 2024, that they have acquired Euro 150 million worth of common shares as part of their ongoing share buyback program. This purchase marks the sixth tranche of their multi-year buyback initiative, which aims to reach approximately Euro 2 billion by 2026. The buying activity was conducted on both the Euronext Milan (EXM) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), with the details of the additional shares bought being reported daily in aggregate form. This move aligns with the plans outlined during the 2022 Capital Markets Day event.

news.headline: PayPoint plc has announced that a Director/PDMR acquired 2,000 ordinary shares at a price of 1,042.0p per share.
The World, Residences at Sea to embark on 2025 journey to six continents, including Sea of Cortez, Madagascar, and West Papua.
news.summary: The upcoming 2025 Journey of The World, the largest privately owned residential yacht globally, will take passengers on a remarkable voyage spanning six continents. This expedition will include visits to the Sea of Cortez, Madagascar, and West Papua. Departing from Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 20, 2024, this unparalleled journey promises an extraordinary experience for travelers. Explore unique destinations across the globe on this prestigious yacht, offering an exclusive and unforgettable travel experience. Get ready to embark on a once-in-a-lifetime journey aboard The World, connecting with diverse cultures and landscapes as you cruise to various locations worldwide.

news.headline: Realizeit achieves ISO 27001 certification for data security and operational excellence, showcasing commitment.
news.summary: Realizeit, a company based in Chicago, has recently obtained ISO 27001 certification, a globally recognized standard for information security management systems. The certification marks a significant achievement for Realizeit, known for its adaptive learning system tailored for business-critical training. This announcement was made on Dec. 20, 2024.

news.headline: Clayton Gibbons appointed as Head of Onsite Power Segment at SPOC Grid Inverter Technologies in Trussville, Alabama.
news.summary: Trussville, Alabama - SPOC Grid Inverter Technologies has recently appointed Clayton Gibbons as the Head of the Onsite Power Segment. Gibbons will be responsible for managing all stationary applications within the GRID business. In his new role, he will be in charge of driving the development and implementation of strategies in this segment. This appointment comes as part of the company's efforts to strengthen its presence in the power sector.

news.headline: FINRA orders 3 firms to pay $8.2 million restitution to customers for mutual fund sales charge waivers; no fines imposed.
news.summary: In Washington, FINRA has directed Edward Jones, Osaic Wealth, Inc., and Cambridge Investment Research, Inc. to collectively reimburse over $8.2 million to customers affected by their lapses in offering mutual fund sales charge waivers and fee rebates on mutual fund transactions. Notably, FINRA opted not to levy fines due to the exceptional cooperation exhibited by the firms during the investigations. This resolution encompasses all three cases.
